letters.label: Letter One
variants:
braaains.

brrains. brains.

briaannss.

WARM.
warm walked close.
WARM.

mmmore.
i want more.

braaains.

meat. i smell meat.

briaannsss.
mmmeat.

warm ones have meat.
i follow.
i always follow.

letters.label: Letter Two
variants:
i follow warm.
Want braiinnss.
i stop.
look at paper.

paper marks.

weakness.gold.
turn back.
brains?

i follow warm.
braiinnss. Want.
i stop.
look at paper.

marks under marks.

zom..bie?
human?
how be human?

letters.label: Letter Three
variants:
i watch warm ones.
no chase now.
just watch.

some look back.
some walk through me.
like i not here.

look-back ones real.


one come close.
warm neck.
mouth open.

paper move on chest.
weakness. gold. turn back.

mouth close.
i step back.

never step back. never.


no forget.
no forget.

i cut words in wall.
weakness. then gold.

marks better now.
i make mark.

b.

letters.label: Letter Four
variants:
weakness?
weakness .. witch.

witch make.

i find witch.
i go close.

letters.label: Letter Five
variants:
witch see me.
witch throw.

green burn.
i no stop.
hunger feel no pain.

one bottle break grey.
grey mist. no burn.


soft.
arms slow. weak.

then—
the fog lifts.

i can think.
the words are mine.

weak. slow.
but here.

- br

letters.label: Letter Six
variants:
the words say gold.
i know gold now.

i open chests.
hands still slow.
the weakness has not left.


gold that is not the apple.
blocks. emeralds.

then a mirror in a chest.
grey face. sunk eyes.

but behind it—
a low door. a warm room.
someone calling a name.

i had a name once.
br...?


then gold that is round.

it shines like it is warm.
an apple, but gold.

i hold it. i do not bite.

weakness in me.
gold in my hand.

both. i have both.

- bri

letters.label: Letter Seven
variants:
i pressed the weakness into my blood.
then i bit the gold.

it was sweet.
i had forgotten sweet.


then the shaking.
the train went red at the edges.

my hands — warm.
my heart a fist, knocking to be let in.

the grey ran out of me like cold water leaving a cup.


i remember.
a low door. a warm room.
a woman calling me in for supper.

calling me Brianne.

i am Brianne.


i am still on the train.
no front. no off.
but a person rides it now.

so i write this for you —
the grey one who cannot read it yet.
you will.

weakness. then gold.
and you turn back.

it works. i did it.
keep going.

- Brianne
